visual_beats: Establishing shot: village eye dream worship, liminal apartment
False calm: hold on empty room

jumpscare_plan.volume_warning: 🔊 VOLUME WARNING — jumpscare at the end. Use headphones.
jumpscare_plan.creator_note: Finale scare — lunge on last beat, sting ~2s before end.

beat_sheet.visual: POV car stops on wet rural road, fog, gas station ahead
Walk toward pumps, streetlight FLICKERS, Form 2 silhouette at tree line
Form 2 dead center at pumps, frozen in light
Slow creepy wave, broken wrist — jumps closer on flicker OFF
Entity steps forward every flicker, gaining ground
Entity fills frame, wave inches from camera
JUMPSCARE BUILD: total blackout — entity EXPLODES toward lens
FINALE JUMPSCARE: face fills frame, maximum lunge impact, motion blur, HARD STOP
